---
title: "Calculate Length at Maturity from Size at Age Data"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Load in Data

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
data("cs_age_size")
```

## Calculate Length at Maturity

```{r}
# Filter to include only 'immature' and 'mature'
maturity_agg <- cs_age_size %>%
  filter(Maturity %in% c("immature", "mature")) %>%
  mutate(Maturity = ifelse(Maturity == "mature", 1, 0)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(LngtClass), is.finite(LngtClass)) %>%
  mutate(LngtClass = floor(LngtClass)) %>%
  group_by(Scientific_name, LngtClass,Maturity) %>%
  summarize(CANoAtLngt = sum(CANoAtLngt))%>%
  group_by(Scientific_name, LngtClass) %>%
  summarise(
    n_mature = sum(CANoAtLngt * Maturity),
    n_total  = sum(CANoAtLngt),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
#species remaining after filtering
unique(maturity_agg$Scientific_name)

#"Chelidonichthys cuculus"    "Gadus morhua"              "Lepidorhombus whiffiagonis"
#"Melanogrammus aeglefinus"   "Merlangius merlangus"       "Merluccius merluccius" "Pleuronectes platessa"      "Scomber scombrus"         "Solea solea"

#Linear model
fit <- glm(
  cbind(n_mature, n_total - n_mature) ~ LngtClass*Scientific_name,
  family = binomial,
  data = maturity_agg
)

coefs <- coef(fit)
#Coefs are in odd order to extract LM of each species 
#need to put negative intercept over slope
lm<-c(
-coefs[1]/coefs[2],
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[3]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[11]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[4]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[12]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[5]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[13]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[6]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[14]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[7]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[15]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[8]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[16]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[9]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[17]),
-1*(coefs[1]+coefs[10]) / (coefs[2]+coefs[18]))

lm_fin <- data.frame(
  Scientific_name = (c("Chelidonichthys cuculus","Gadus morhua","Lepidorhombus whiffiagonis",
                       "Melanogrammus aeglefinus","Merlangius merlangus",
                       "Merluccius merluccius","Pleuronectes platessa","Scomber scombrus",
                       "Solea solea")),
  l_mat = as.numeric(lm),
  row.names = NULL
)

l_mat<-lm_fin
```

Weight at Maturity

```{r}
# Filter to include only 'immature' and 'mature'
maturity_agg <- cs_age_size %>%
  filter(Maturity %in% c("immature", "mature")) %>%
  mutate(Maturity = ifelse(Maturity == "mature", 1, 0)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IndWgt), is.finite(IndWgt)) %>%
  mutate(IndWgt = floor(IndWgt)) %>%
  group_by(Scientific_name, IndWgt,Maturity) %>%
  summarize(CANoAtLngt = sum(CANoAtLngt))%>%
    uncount(CANoAtLngt)

weight_maturity <- maturity_agg %>%
    filter(IndWgt > 0) %>% 
    group_by(Scientific_name) %>%
    group_modify(~ {
        # Fit model on log scale
        fit_log <- glm(Maturity ~ log(IndWgt), family = binomial, data = .x)
        cc <- coef(fit_log)
        
        # Define the intercepts/slopes
        intercept <- cc[1]
        slope <- cc[2]
        
        # Calculate W50 (P = 0.5) -> logit is 0
        w_mat <- exp(-intercept / slope)
        
        # Calculate W25 (P = 0.25) -> logit is log(1/3)
        w_mat25 <- exp((log(1/3) - intercept) / slope)
        
        data.frame(
            w_mat = as.numeric(w_mat),
            w_mat25 = as.numeric(w_mat25)
        )
    })

weight_maturity
```

# Combine Parameters into single data frame

```{r}
cs_calculated_histories<-l_mat%>%
    left_join(age_mat, by="Scientific_name")
use_data(cs_calculated_histories,overwrite=TRUE)
```

# Boarfish l_mat

```{r}
boarfish<-read.csv("/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/caprosaper_jessicawestworth.csv")
boarfish<-boarfish%>%
    filter(!MATURE_IMATURE=="I")
boarfish$MATURE_IMATURE<-as.numeric(boarfish$MATURE_IMATURE)

fit <- glm(MATURE_IMATURE ~ TL_cm, family = binomial, 
           data = boarfish)
coefs <- coef(fit)

lm<-c(-coefs[1]/coefs[2])

ggplot(boarfish, aes(x = TL_cm, y = MATURE_IMATURE)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +  # jitter for binary points
  # Add logistic regression curves for each species
  stat_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"), se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = "Length class",
    y = "Probability of being mature",
    color = "Species",
    title = "Maturity vs Length by Species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Boarfish w_mat

```{r}
boarfish<-read.csv("/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/caprosaper_jessicawestworth.csv")
boarfish<-boarfish%>%
    filter(!MATURE_IMATURE=="I")
boarfish$MATURE_IMATURE<-as.numeric(boarfish$MATURE_IMATURE)
boarfish$a<-0.00724
boarfish$b<-3.07
boarfish$IndWgt<-boarfish$a*boarfish$TL_cm^boarfish$b

# Fit model on log scale
fit_log <- glm(MATURE_IMATURE ~ log(IndWgt), family = binomial, data = boarfish)
cc <- coef(fit_log)
        
# Define the intercepts/slopes
intercept <- cc[1]
slope <- cc[2]
        
# Calculate W50 (P = 0.5) -> logit is 0
w_mat <- exp(-intercept / slope)
        
# Calculate W25 (P = 0.25) -> logit is log(1/3)
w_mat25 <- exp((log(1/3) - intercept) / slope)
        
weight_maturity_boarfish<-data.frame(
    w_mat = as.numeric(w_mat),
    w_mat25 = as.numeric(w_mat25))
```
